claims.proof_boundary: Open RH-level asymptotic target only; the artifact proves the exact curvature identities and remainder reduction but not the required sign, all-x positivity, Lambda <= 0, or RH.
claims.current_blocker: No uniform lower bound is known for the corrected finite oscillatory coercivity in the thin scaled strip at and below c_*.
claims.required_upgrade: Prove a phase-sensitive Wronskian or equivalent finite-sum coercivity bound that dominates the explicit global C2 remainder throughout 0<=tL<=c_*+o(1).
